message:
test(ft-ombfl.11): add boundary tests for l_inf threshold

Adds two tests pinning the exact boundary semantics of the comparator's
l_inf gate:
- pixel_delta_exactly_at_l_inf_threshold_passes: delta == max_l_inf is
  INSIDE the tolerance band (the gate uses `<=`).
- pixel_delta_one_past_l_inf_threshold_fails: delta == max_l_inf + 1
  is the first failing case.

Verified by mutation testing: temporarily flipping `<=` to `<` in the
pass gate causes exactly the boundary-passes test to fail (29 passed,
1 failed), restored cleanly.

Total comparator unit suite: 30 tests covering identical/diff (within/
at/over l_inf), SSIM properties (identical/constant/local-block-
degrades), threshold overrides, dimension-mismatch error path, diff-
PNG marking + all-different overflow guard, perf budget, alpha-channel
detection, degenerate sizes, serde roundtrip, JSON-key contract, plus
4 proptest properties.

(Re-commit: my prior 869773dd landed empty — staged change was
cleared by an intervening stash/rebase round-trip.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
